name: ai-voice-studio
displayName: AI Voice Studio: Qwen, MiMo & Gemini TTS
description: 在 VS Code 里朗读文本、生成语音：Qwen TTS、MiMo TTS（小米）、Google Gemini TTS 多家语音合成一键切换，支持声音克隆、音色设计、情感语气标签、流式播放与亚秒级首字音延迟。Read text aloud in VS Code with Qwen, MiMo and Gemini TTS — multi-provider text-to-speech with voice cloning, voice design, emotion tags, and sub-second streaming.

aiVoiceStudio.playbackRate.description: Playback rate (0.5–4.0). Adjusts player speed without re-synthesis.

aiVoiceStudio.chunkSize.description: Maximum characters per synthesis chunk. Long text is split at sentence boundaries; the next chunk synthesizes while the current one plays.

enumDescriptions: Preset voices (Bingtang / Chloe / etc.). Supports singing mode and tag control.
Voice Design — describe the voice in plain language; no preset needed.
Voice Clone — clone a custom voice from an mp3/wav sample (≤10 MB).
Legacy V2 model with the original Chinese / English presets.
aiVoiceStudio.mimo.model.description: MiMo TTS model. v2.5 adds Voice Design and Voice Clone alongside the preset model.

aiVoiceStudio.mimo.voice.description: Default MiMo voice ID. Uses an explicit English voice because MiMo Default is region-dependent. Ignored for the voicedesign / voiceclone models.

aiVoiceStudio.mimo.baseUrl.description: MiMo Token Plan base URL. Same host serves the OpenAI-compatible /v1 (TTS) and Anthropic-compatible /anthropic routes; both share Token Plan billing.

aiVoiceStudio.mimo.stylePrompt.description: Style instruction sent as the role:user message. Doubles as the voice description for the voicedesign model (required there). Use the Insert Director Mode template button in the sidebar for richer control.

aiVoiceStudio.mimo.openingStyleTags.description: Opening-style tags injected as a leading (tag) prefix on the synthesized text (e.g. '开心', '严肃', '兴奋', '粤语', '夹子音'). Custom values are accepted in addition to the doc presets. The 唱歌 tag overrides everything else.

aiVoiceStudio.mimo.audioEventTags.description: Audio-event tags injected as a Chinese-bracket prefix (e.g. '紧张', '笑', '深呼吸', '哽咽'). Custom values are accepted alongside the doc presets.

aiVoiceStudio.mimo.stylePresets.description: Saved (name, stylePrompt, opening tags, event tags) bundles. Manage them from the sidebar's Preset row.

enumDescriptions: Latest preview. 30 prebuilt voices, free on AI Studio free tier.
Earlier Flash TTS preview, same 30-voice roster.
Pro variant of the 2.5 TTS preview, higher quality.

aiVoiceStudio.gemini.voice.description: Default Gemini prebuilt voice. 30 personalities (Zephyr, Puck, Kore, Charon, …).

aiVoiceStudio.gemini.baseUrl.description: Generative Language API base URL. The TTS endpoint is appended as /models/{model}:generateContent.

aiVoiceStudio.gemini.stylePreamble.description: Optional inline preamble prefixed in front of each chunk (e.g. 'Read in a calm narrator voice'). Combine with [bracket] audio tags inside the text for finer control.

enumDescriptions: Qwen3 TTS Flash — HTTP SSE streaming, sub-second first audio.
Qwen3 TTS Instruct Flash — HTTP SSE with style instructions.
Qwen3 TTS Flash Realtime — WebSocket, ~100 ms server-side TTFB (cold-connect handshake still costs ~400 ms).
Qwen3 TTS Instruct Flash Realtime — WebSocket with style instructions.
aiVoiceStudio.qwen.model.description: Qwen-TTS model. *-realtime variants use the WebSocket realtime endpoint; the others use HTTP SSE.

enumDescriptions: International endpoint: dashscope-intl.aliyuncs.com. Uses a region-specific API key.

aiVoiceStudio.qwen.languageType.description: Qwen-TTS language_type. Choose a single language for better pronunciation, or Auto for mixed/unknown text.

aiVoiceStudio.qwen.instructions.description: Style instructions sent only when model is qwen3-tts-instruct-flash.

scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run clean && npm run compile
